The first test case says centered_hexagonal_number(10) should be 271. Let me calculate using that formula. If n=10, then 3*10*9 + 1 = 270 +1 = 271. That matches the first test case. The second test case, n=2: 3*2*1 +1=6 +1=7, which matches the second test case. Third test case, n=9: 3*9*8 +1=216 +1=217. So that formula works.
